ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "job_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job category */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the job category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of data collection */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the specified category */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of employees in the specified category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("job_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the initiative (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the expected or actual impact of the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative metric entry */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the initiative */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of data collection */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of employees impacted by the initiative */,
  "percentage_impacted" REAL /* Percentage of employees impacted by the initiative */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_metrics_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_metrics_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("job_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_metrics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_metrics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Diversity Officer) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., report, initiative) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "check_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the check */,
  "auditor" TEXT /* Name or ID of the auditor who performed the check */,
  "audit_report_path" TEXT /* Path to the audit report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_check_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check detail */,
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance check */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of data collection */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check for the specified category */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance check result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_check_details_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES compliance_checks ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_check_details_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_check_details_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_check_details_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_check_details_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("job_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategic_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategic goal */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategic goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "current_value" INTEGER /* Current value of the goal */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategic_goals_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal metric entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strategic goal */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of data collection */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of employees contributing to the goal */,
  "percentage_achieved" REAL /* Percentage of the goal achieved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_metrics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_metrics_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("job_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_metrics_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES strategic_goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_metrics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)
